positive: A highly detailed, geometrically stylized illustration of an ethereal forest guardian figure intertwined with bioluminescent, stylized flora. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring clean, bold linework, deep forest silhouettes, and intricate botanical patterns formed by luminous, glowing roots and leaves. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo blue, emerald green, and glowing metallic gold accents. The aesthetic should be a fusion of Art Deco and mystic etching, suitable for apparel printing. Perfect for vector quality.
negative: bad anatomy, blurry, distorted, text, watermark, signature, low detail, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, cluttered, messy, low contrast
